Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}You live in a world where emptiness roams and chaos reigns...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}You struggle so fervently, twinkling like stars in the night, but such delusion will not lead to deliverance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Why not join us and the Messiah, and await the moment of salvation?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}You say that only because you don't know the truth.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Heed the voice of the Messiah, and follow the path to true salvation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}If you wish to hear the voice of the Messiah, you must make haste...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That suspicious man that preached to me[n]is staring at me from over by the wall...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Once he starts, it's probably going[n]to take a while for him to finish...[n]{f 1 1}
